mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_info
AND status = #{status}
AND (FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR), node_ids) > 0 OR node_ids = CAST(#{nodeId} AS VARCHAR))
AND (name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR jar_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_info (name, node_ids, start_script, stop_script, restart_script, jvm_opts, env_vars, jar_name, deploy_dir, health_check_enabled, health_check_port, health_check_path, health_check_keyword, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{nodeIds}, #{startScript}, #{stopScript}, #{restartScript}, #{jvmOpts}, #{envVars}, #{jarName}, #{deployDir}, #{healthCheckEnabled}, #{healthCheckPort}, #{healthCheckPath}, #{healthCheckKeyword}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_info SET name = #{name}, node_ids = #{nodeIds}, start_script = #{startScript}, stop_script = #{stopScript}, restart_script = #{restartScript}, jvm_opts = #{jvmOpts}, env_vars = #{envVars}, jar_name = #{jarName}, deploy_dir = #{deployDir}, health_check_enabled = #{healthCheckEnabled}, health_check_port = #{healthCheckPort}, health_check_path = #{healthCheckPath}, health_check_keyword = #{healthCheckKeyword}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT node_ids FROM project_info WHERE id = #{id}
